error_signature: SSH node required for file deletion
title: Using SSH node for file deletion in n8n v2
symptom: Users unable to use Execute Command node can use the SSH node to delete files, but must configure SSH credentials first.
root_cause: When the Execute Command node is disabled, users can still perform file operations using the SSH node, but they need to set up SSH credentials to connect to the server where the files are located.
fix_steps: Configure and link your SSH credentials in n8n.
Use the SSH node to execute the command 'rm -f /tmp/*' to delete files.
agent_instruction: Set up SSH credentials and use the SSH node to run the delete command.
safety_notes: Ensure you have the correct permissions to delete files on the remote server.
